summary:
Claim: The depicted system corresponds to Palmer’s classification of permanent teeth.  
Evidence: - Tooth numbering begins at the upper right central incisor (#1) and progresses systematically across all quadrants. - It follows an anterior-to-posterior pattern within each quadrant, ending at the lower left with tooth #32.  
Answer: B
